# Getting Support for PromptForge AI

Welcome! Thank you for using PromptForge AI. If you need help, please check the following resources:

## 🔍 1. Check the FAQ & Documentation
Before asking a question, please review:
- The [README](../README.md#faq--troubleshooting) FAQ section
- The [Architecture Specification](../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)
- The [Database Schema details](../docs/DATABASE_SCHEMA.md)

## 💬 2. GitHub Discussions
For general questions, configuration help, and ideas, please use our [GitHub Discussions Page](https://github.com/IrfanCodesBTW/PromptForge-AI/discussions). 
Check the **Q&A** category to see if your question has already been answered.

## 🐛 3. Report a Bug or Request a Feature
If you've found a bug or want to suggest a new feature, please search existing issues first. If it hasn't been reported, open a new issue using our templates:
- [Report a Bug](https://github.com/IrfanCodesBTW/PromptForge-AI/issues/new?assignees=&labels=bug&projects=&template=bug_report.yml)
- [Request a Feature](https://github.com/IrfanCodesBTW/PromptForge-AI/issues/new?assignees=&labels=enhancement&projects=&template=feature_request.yml)

## 🛡️ 4. Security Vulnerabilities
Please do NOT open public issues for security vulnerabilities. Review our [Security Policy](SECURITY.md) to report vulnerabilities privately.
